offer: For restaurant managers processing 5–15 shifts/week, inefficient scheduling causes staff dissatisfaction and increased labor costs. We automate shift scheduling instead of manual scheduling and tracking.
problem: Inefficient shift scheduling and overtime tracking
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on scheduling tools
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for restaurant managers
try_it: Let users try manual shift entry and overtime tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
